commands: echo '=== fetch AUTH_SEED_PASSWORD from Parameter Store (SecureString) ==='
echo '=== ensure container env has AUTH_SEED_PASSWORD (no echo of secret) ==='
docker exec silent-shield-api python -m app.auth.cli seed
echo '=== auth smoke (login quanly → Cookie header → /review-cases) ==='

docker exec silent-shield-api python -c "import json, urllib.request; from app.config import get_settings; get_settings.cache_clear(); pw=get_settings().auth_seed_password.get_secret_value(); assert pw.strip(), 'empty_seed'; req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/login', data=json.dumps({'username':'quanly','password':pw}).encode(), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}, method='POST');
with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
  login=json.load(resp); cookie=(resp.headers.get('Set-Cookie') or '').split(';',1)[0]
print('login_ok', {k:login.get(k) for k in ('account_id','active_role','roles')}); cases=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/review-cases', headers={'Cookie':cookie}))); print('list_state', cases.get('state'), 'n', len(cases.get('items') or []))"
